aronui.when_to_use: Use to retrieve a list of currently pending one-shot timers for this chat, including their IDs, time remaining, and actions.
aronui.output_shape: Returns a string: either 'No timers are currently pending.' or a list of timer details when timers exist.

pitfalls.text: Tool ignores all input arguments (including extraneous, invalid types, or null) and always returns a success message. No errors encountered even with incorrect parameter types.

procedure: Call the tool with an empty object parameter {} (or any object) to list pending timers.
If timers exist, they will be returned in a readable format; otherwise, a default message is shown.
verification: Confirm the response is a string indicating either no timers or listing timer details.
Since the tool is lenient, any valid object input will succeed; verify output matches expected format.
